description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly light gray, with large windows that allow for ample natural light and provide a sleek, contemporary appearance. Several palm trees and shrubs are positioned around the house, enhancing its integration with a landscaped urban or suburban environment. The house includes a prominent entryway with a small overhang and steps, and the roofline is varied with multiple levels and sections. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller, more private openings. The overall structure suggests a spacious, open-plan interior with a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, flat roof, and two palm trees flanking the facade.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the entry steps, overhang, and additional landscaping on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more windows, and a palm tree on the right.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the flat roof sections, large window, and surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, steps, and minimalist detailing
